product.name: ArSport
product.categorySourceGroup: Knit Interlock Polyester Fabrics for T-Shirts
descriptions: ArSport is 100% Polyester interlock knit fabric for team uniforms.
It is suitable for sublimation printing.
technicalParameters: Dimensinal Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | TS EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: ArSport is 100% Polyester interlock knit fabric for team uniforms.
acceptedMatches.rationale: The product is explicitly described as a sports knit fabric intended for team uniforms, directly supporting sport apparel use.

evidence: ArSport is 100% Polyester interlock knit fabric for team uniforms.
primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly designed and marketed for team uniforms and sportswear, matching the sport application directly.

secondary.rationale: No other independent end use is stated; sublimation printing suitability is a processing feature, not a distinct commercial application.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Sublimation printing is a manufacturing feature of the sportswear fabric, not a distinct signage/print end product.
